# KDF Starter Astro - Full Documentation

## About KDF Starter Astro
KDF Starter Astro is a framework-agnostic starting template designed for building websites using the Konde Design Framework (KDF) and Astro. It outputs strictly optimized static HTML and inline styles mapped from structured JSON design tokens.

## What is KDF?
The Konde Design Framework is a unified design system that enables rapid, consistent, and beautiful UI development across the Konde ecosystem. It is built to be AI-native, allowing both human developers and autonomous AI agents to construct UIs by writing strictly-typed JSON schemas rather than writing manual HTML/CSS. KDF compiles these schemas into atomic CSS classes and inline custom properties.

## Project Structure
- `/designs/`: Contains JSON design token mapping files (e.g. `starter.json`, `layout.json`).
- `/src/components/`: Reusable Astro layout elements (`Navbar.astro`, `Footer.astro`).
- `/src/pages/`: Page routing files (`index.astro`, `dashboard.astro`, `about.astro`).
- `/src/styles/`: Theme-specific stylesheets (`premium.css`, `fonts.css`).
- `astro.config.mjs`: Astro configuration containing sitemap and path definitions.

## Key Features
- **KDF Native**: Uses `@kondeio/kdf` to resolve JSON design tokens.
- **SEO & AI Ready**: Auto-generated XML Sitemap, canonical tags, metadata, and llms.txt context.
- **Blazing Fast**: Compiles to static HTML with zero client-side JavaScript overhead.

## Developer Resources & Standalone Repositories
- **Standalone Repository**: [KondeIO/kdf-starter-astro](https://github.com/KondeIO/kdf-starter-astro)
- **Monorepo Repository**: [KondeIO/konde-io](https://github.com/KondeIO/konde-io)
- **KDF Core Documentation**: [KDF Doc](https://github.com/KondeIO/kdf/blob/main/docs/doc.md)
- **Playground**: [KDF Playground](https://playground.konde.io/)
